name: Blumgi Bounce
author: Poki
description: Blumgi Bounce is a fun physics game where your one and only mission is simple: score the goal! Hold to build strength, release at the perfect moment, and watch the ball bounce off walls and obstacles as it makes its wild journey to the hoop. Play casually to relax or challenge yourself for the perfect shot. Ready to bounce your way to victory? How to play Blumgi Bounce? Click or tap to play! Hold to build strength and release to shoot. Who created Blumgi Bounce? Blumgi Bounce is created by Blumgi. Play their other games on Poki: Blumgi Slime , Blumgi Ball , Blumgi Rocket , Blumgi Castle , Swingo , Blumgi Bloom , blumgi-dargon, Blumgi Racers , Blumgi Merge , Blumgi Paintball and Blumgi Soccer ! How can I play Blumgi Bounce for free? You can play Blumgi Bounce for free on Poki. Can I play Blumgi Bounce on mobile devices and desktop? Blumgi Bounce can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Blumgi Bounce with my friend? Yes! Blumgi Bounce is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same device!
